body:
### Security intent

This control protects cryptographic boundaries by ensuring that **databases are encrypted**.

### Key state reviewed

The assessment reviews databases with no encryption in Azure / Microsoft Entra, AWS, Alibaba Cloud, and Google Cloud. It focuses on key access, lifecycle, rotation, deletion, exposure, or encryption usage depending on the control.

### Specialist guidance

Encryption controls should be remediated with dependency awareness. Before disabling, rotating, deleting, or replacing a key, confirm which services use it, validate decrypt paths, and keep old key material available until dependent workloads are safely migrated.
name: Ensure databases are encrypted
remediationDescription:
Depending on the provider and the service you use, check out the following resources:

#### AWS

In AWS, you can only encrypt a database when you create it. However, you can create a snapshot of a database, encrypt that snapshot, and restore it as encrypted. 



**From the Console**



Perform the following actions to create an encrypted database instance from the current one:



1. Open the security settings using the "Open in AWS" menu option
2. Select `Actions`, and then `Take a snapshot`
3. Give it a name and click `Take snapshot`
4. Select the newly created snapshot, and then `Actions`, `Copy snapshot`
5. Select the region and give it a name
6. Select a KMS key to encrypt the database with
7. After you created the copy, select it
8. Select `Actions`, and then `Restore snapshot`
9. Select the appropriate settings and click `Restore DB Instance`



**Default Value**



By default, encryption is turned on when creating a new database.



**References**



1. [Encrypting Amazon RDS resources](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonRDS/latest/UserGuide/Overview.Encryption.html)
2. [Copying a DB snapshot](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonRDS/latest/UserGuide/USER_CopySnapshot.html)


#### Azure
* [Data encryption for Azure Database for MySQL by using the Azure portal](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/mysql/single-server/how-to-data-encryption-portal)
* [Data encryption for Azure Database for MySQL - Flexible Server by using the Azure portal Preview](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/mysql/flexible-server/how-to-data-encryption-portal)
* [Data encryption for Azure Database for PostgreSQL Single server by using the Azure portal](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/postgresql/single-server/how-to-data-encryption-portal)
* [Security in Azure Database for PostgreSQL - Flexible Server](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/postgresql/flexible-server/concepts-security)

#### Google Cloud
* [Cloud SQL](https://cloud.google.com/sql/faq#encryption)

#### Alibaba
* [ApsaraDB](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/apsaradb-for-rds/latest/configure-disk-encryption-for-an-apsaradb-rds-for-mysql-instance)
